title: ED chest pain documentation

red_flags.text: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.
red_flags.rationale: The exact red-flag and referral section supports recording measured vital data, time-critical symptoms, and escalation or specialist discussion only when assessed or clinician-decided.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45

red_flags.text: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.
red_flags.rationale: The adult virtual-care scope was reviewed and limits transfer to undifferentiated in-person emergency chest pain.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45

investigations.text: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.
investigations.rationale: The exact DHA chest-pain history section supports documenting onset, duration, severity, functional impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and clinician-assessed risk context without inferring a cause.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45

investigations.text: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.
investigations.rationale: The exact investigation section supports documenting tests or imaging already performed or reviewed by the clinician, without recommending them.
investigations.evidence_extract: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45

source_limitations: Detailed pain descriptors, cardiovascular and thromboembolic risk, examination, ECG, biomarkers, imaging, diagnosis, treatment, reassessment, observation and disposition remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
